Socialtrait Q3 review 2026-07-07 Confidential

Pilot results

Simulation predicted the market. Three times out of three.

Q3 audience-simulation pilot results and the case for a ten-account expansion.

Suraj · Socialtrait
SocialtraitQ3 review 02 / 05

01Headline numbers

Three pilots, one pattern: the simulation called every winner

Prediction accuracy
87%
interval coverage 11/12 cells
Time to insight
4hrs
panels took 19 days median
Media saved
$340k
one flagged creative, one pilot
Takeaway Simulation is accurate enough to gate media spend today.
SocialtraitQ3 review 03 / 05

02Speed

Answers land inside the campaign cycle, not after it

FIG 01 Median question → segmented result. SOURCE: pilot instrumentation.
  • 9-day median creative iteration cycle at pilot clients
  • Panels answer after the decision; simulation answers before
  • Same-day re-tests after every creative revision
Takeaway Research finally moves at the speed the campaign already does.
SocialtraitQ3 review 04 / 05

03Expansion

$53k and one engineer buys a ten-account proof by October

  • Jul — onboard 4 pipeline accounts, 8 studies
  • Aug — 4 new logos, 12 studies, pricing test
  • Sep — 2 enterprise validations against media holdouts
  • Instrumentation unchanged — same accuracy dashboard reviewed monthly
The ask Approve budget and headcount by July 18 to finish before Q4 planning.
SocialtraitQ3 review 05 / 05

Decision requested

Expand the pilot. Ten accounts, this quarter.

Approval needed by July 18 · detail in ST-OP-014
